rationale.R1.5: The delegation is exclusively about section ordering and narrative arc. The artifact exhibits a disordered flow: training setup → related work → experimental protocol → results → contribution claim. The principal contribution (value-of-information gating rule) appears last, after results it motivates, inverting the standard claim-before-evidence arc. Resequencing these blocks to produce a coherent narrative (e.g., contribution claim → setup → related work → protocol → results) is the entire and load-bearing task.
